name: GoPro HERO Compact Action Camera
description: The GoPro HERO is a compact action camera capable of recording UHD 4K video in practically any adventure application thanks to its lightweight and rugged design.

features.Key Features:: UHD 4K30/1080p30 Video, 12MP Photos | 2.7K60/50 2x Slow-Motion Video | HyperSmooth Video Stabilization | Rear LCD Touchscreen | Voice Control, Wi-Fi Connectivity | 33' Waterproof without Housing | 1-Hour Battery Runtime, USB-C Port | GoPro Quik App
